title: GEEPAS 2-in-1 Food Jug Blender | 1.8L Juice Jar & 60G Mini Coffee Spice Mill | 6-Leaf Stainless-Steel Blades 3 Speed & Pulse Smoothie Maker Turbo Button for Ice Crushing Overheat Protection 600W White
features: ✅ NOTE – SAFETY LOCK FEATURE – This blender operates only when the jar is securely closed and locked onto the motor, ensuring safe use and preventing accidental starts. A must-have for families with kids.

✅ BLEND LIKE A PRO-With a powerful 600W motor, this smoothie blender takes on sauces, and even ice like a champ. You’ll get smooth results in seconds. It’s quick, reliable, and always ready. No more lumpy blends—just creamy perfection every time.

✅ YOUR TEXTURE, YOUR WAY-With 3 speeds and a pulse button, you’re in total control. Want it chunky or silky smooth? You decide. Blender for kitchen is perfect for picky eaters or just for perfecting your recipes. Blending should feel personal—and now it does.

✅ TURBO WHEN YOU NEED IT-Thick shakes or frozen mixes? Just hit turbo for instant power. Food blender handles those hard-to-blend ingredients without a fuss. One press and it’s go-time—because your mornings don’t wait.

✅ JUG BLENDER FOR EVERY TASK – The large 1.8L jug blender handles big batches of fruits and veggies, while the mini jar grinds nuts, seeds, spices, and coffee beans. One solution for all your prep needs.
description: Product Description EASY TO USE CONTROL DIAL Choose from low speed, high speed or the pulse function. VERSATILE 2-IN-1 OPERATION Includes blender jug & grinder cup for fast food preparation. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Durable blades make light work of chopping ingredients. 1.8 LITRE CAPACITY The 1.8 litre jar offers ample capacity for your blending needs.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Adjustable Speed Control, Drip Holes on Lid, Ice Crushing, Safety Switch, Turbo Boost
